narrative:
Newton Township has 3,343 registered voters, with 59.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.5 percentage points.
